intent: Wide-shell 2BR / 2 baths CLUSTERED, genuine FRONT-BACK split, GR style — 14x11 lot, NO CARPORT. Envelope 10x7 = 70 m² floor. One wall spans the full width, dividing the front public band (great_room + kitchen, side-by-side) from the rear private row (master | ensuite | common | standard, baths clustered in the middle). Solves via ldk_horizontal=true (relaxes the solver's default LDK vertical-stacking rules) and master-only left anchoring (great_room is NOT left-anchored, letting it span freely to reach every private-row room it must share a wall with).
must_haves: one wall spans the full width dividing public front from private rear
great_room and kitchen sit side-by-side across the front, not stacked
master and standard each door directly into the great room, no hall
ensuite and common bath clustered together in the middle of the private row
